title: How to Build a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: YouTube video demonstrating Rocket 1.0, a platform designed to maintain context across fragmented AI workflows (research, notes, code, tracking). The video showcases building a startup MVP in one day by integrating research via Perplexity, planning in Claude, coding in Cursor, and tracking in Rocket, addressing the loss of context between disconnected tools.
writeup: The video demonstrates Rocket 1.0, a platform built to preserve context across fragmented AI workflows that span research, notes, code, and tracking. It walks through building a startup MVP in a single day by chaining tools: research in Perplexity, planning in Claude, coding in Cursor, and progress tracking in Rocket. The central problem it addresses is the loss of context when work moves between disconnected tools, and Rocket positions itself as the connective layer that carries that context through. The takeaway is a concrete end-to-end pipeline for idea-to-launch MVP development that keeps the workflow stitched together.
